title: Why Time Runs Faster On a Mountain

segments.text: Time literally runs faster on a mountain than at the beach.
And it's not a trick, it's Einstein.
Gravity actually slows down time, just a tiny bit.
The farther you are from Earth's mass, the faster your clock ticks.
GPS satellites have to correct for this every single day.
So someone on a mountain really does age a sliver faster than you.
Follow Curio for your daily dose of science.

description: Gravity slows time, so clocks tick faster higher up, and GPS has to correct for it. Follow for daily science & tech!
